principles: Every screen is built for enterprise security professionals — density, clarity, and speed over decoration.
Shell structure is non-negotiable: topbar + left nav + sub-header + content body on every page.
Components communicate status through position and color semantics, never through tooltips alone.
Spacing, radius, and type size follow a strict scale — off-scale values are bugs, not style choices.
One dominant CTA per section; navigation and hierarchy do the rest of the work.
always: Use topbar background:#131313 with PAI logo image only — never 'Prevalent AI' text.
Use border-radius:44px on all CTA/text buttons, 4px on cards and table wrappers, 8px on inputs.
Show severity and status in a visible table column — never tooltip-only.
Use tables for list data, not cards.
Require confirmation modal for every destructive action — name the item, state the consequence.
Sub-header must have two lines: page title (12px/500) on line 1, breadcrumb on line 2.
Left nav workspace label must be the workspace name — never 'Prevalent AI'.
Validate form fields on blur only and preserve the entered value on error.
Always make sure left nav workspace have collapsible option and inside menu should also have collapsible option
Include pagination and row count on every table.
never: Never use <canvas> or external chart libraries (Chart.js, D3, ECharts).
Never apply custom background-color or color to a button — use variant classes only.
Never add page-level tabs unless explicitly requested.
Never use style='display:flex' inline on .row-actions — CSS only.
Never place action icons in the same <td> as the status badge.
Never use <h1> below the sub-header or an 18px title in the sub-header.
Never add icons, colored borders, or box-shadow to KPI cards.

Never use off-scale spacing values for margin, padding, or gap: 3, 5, 6, 7, 10, 11, 13, 15px. Note: border-radius is NOT spacing — progress bars, pills, tags, and decorative elements may use any border-radius that fits their shape.
Never auto-dismiss error or warning toasts.
Never use 🚧 in table empty states — use 🚦 only.

forms: Validate on blur, never per keystroke.
Always pair red border with a specific error message below the field.
Preserve entered value on error — never clear the field.
Required fields marked with red asterisk: *.
empty_states: Full-page error: 🚧 emoji, 'Oops!' heading, Refresh button, keep topbar/nav visible.
Section error: 🚧 emoji, 'Data Retrieval Failed', Refresh button, no page redirect.
Table empty: 🚦 emoji, 'No Data… For Now!', no Refresh button, keep thead and pagination visible.
Inline field error: red border 1.5px + ⓘ icon + message below, validate on blur only.
